# Dino Initiative

> A free, anonymous mental health companion offering a daily AI-guided quiz, crisis hotlines, kindness letters, and gentle resources. Dino Initiative does not provide medical advice.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Dino Initiative and entry to all tools.
- [The Dino App](/app): Marketing page for the Dino mental health app.
- [Our Story](/our-story): How and why Dino Initiative was created.
- [Resources](/resources): Coping tools, journaling prompts, and guidance on when to reach out.
- [Crisis Hotlines](/hotlines): Verified mental health hotlines for 37 countries.
- [Daily Quiz](/quiz): AI-generated 14-question mental health check-in.
- [Quiz Report](/report): Personal dashboard summarizing past quiz results.
- [Kindness Letters](/kindness): Anonymous, moderated message board of supportive notes.
- [Write a Letter](/kindness/new): Submit an anonymous kindness letter.
- [Get Involved](/get-involved): Join the community and support the project.
- [Support](/support): Help and contact information.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Copyright](/copyright): Copyright and ownership notice.
